extortion.description: plus.com.my zoominfo.com/c/plus-malaysia-berhad/450191982 PLUS Malaysia Berhad provides a comprehensive travel experience through its expressways, offering facilities for relaxation and refreshment along the routes. The company enhances travel convenience with its PLUS App, which includes features like traffic updates, toll fare calculations, and a rewards program called PLUSMiles. Their services are designed for all road users in Peninsular Malaysia, ensuring smooth and safe journeys.
